meaning: n.[生](人类及热血动物保持体温的)生热力
examples: Natural gas caloricity gaging is more scientific and impartial than volume gaging and mass gaging.
The composite control system with"prefeed"and "backfeed"which controls caloricity more sensitive, accurate and faster than the one just with"backfeed"is involved.
This paper fulfils the automatic-mix-control of high caloricity gas and low caloricity gas using the intelligent control and the single neuron adaptive PSD controller.
